benefits.description: Facial leanness appearance despite being in a bulk, attributed to anti-inflammatory effect reducing face puffiness
Improved facial appearance with leaner look

protocol_notes: User reports 'Klow' which appears to be a pre-mixed blend containing KPV and other anti-inflammatory compounds (GHK mentioned in comments). Started 21 days ago. User was actively bulking and gaining weight (approximately 2kg gained in prior month) but noticed facial definition improvement. Third-party observation confirmed the facial leanness change.
